name: routeiq-routing-golden-v1
description: Versioned golden/held-out dataset for the RouteIQ offline eval harness (RouteIQ-8d24). request -> expected-quality per strategy. Used to replay routing decisions offline (no live traffic) and detect per-strategy quality regressions before shipping. Bump version on any change.

cases.response_content: I'm doing well, thank you! How can I help you today?
You're welcome! Let me know if you need anything else.

messages.content: Prove that the square root of 2 is irrational.

cases.response_content: Assume sqrt(2) = a/b in lowest terms. Then 2 = a^2/b^2, so a^2 = 2 b^2, meaning a is even, a = 2k, then b is also even - contradiction.

messages.content: Explain why a stack overflow happens in deep recursion.

cases.response_content: Each recursive call pushes a frame onto the call stack; deep recursion exhausts the fixed stack region, raising a stack overflow.
